name: Regular Cola

pros.title: very available and cheap
pros.explanation: That is about the only practical argument it has.

pros.title: use case can matter more than macros
pros.explanation: This category is really about function and trade-offs.

pros.title: sometimes makes sense in a narrow use case
pros.explanation: Context matters more here than raw nutrient purity.

cons.title: liquid sugar is a brutal downside
cons.explanation: This is almost the exact kind of misc item the category should bury.

cons.title: basically no useful nutrition
cons.explanation: It gives up nutritional value while still costing calories.

cons.title: easy to oversell beyond what the numbers support
cons.explanation: Misc items often attract exaggerated narratives.

scoreReadiness.summary: This generic regular-cola record is simple and stable enough for launch scripting because the core story is just sugar delivery plus minimal nutrition.

sourceNotes: Identity locked to standard sugar-sweetened regular cola, per 100 g as sold.
Core nutrient values align with generic beverage nutrition-label style cola entries.
This is intentionally a generic regular-cola record rather than a specific brand SKU.
